prompt_text: HR tools with native Slack integration
response:
# HR Tools with Native Slack Integration

## Payroll & Benefits
- **Gusto** - Payroll, benefits, HR in one platform
- **Rippling** - Unified workforce management
- **ADP** - Enterprise payroll solutions
- **Paychex Flex** - Payroll and HR platform

## Leave & Time Off
- **Factorial** - HR management with time tracking
- **Bamboo HR** - HRIS with leave management
- **Deel** - Global payroll with leave tracking
- **Lattice** - Performance management with time-off features

## Recruiting & Onboarding
- **Greenhouse** - Applicant tracking system
- **Lever** - Hiring platform
- **BambooHR** - Onboarding workflows
- **Workable** - HRIS and recruiting

## Engagement & Performance
- **Lattice** - Performance management and engagement
- **Culture Amp** - Employee engagement surveys
- **Officevibe** - Team engagement platform
- **15Five** - Performance and engagement

## Learning & Development
- **LinkedIn Learning** - Course platform with Slack alerts
- **Udemy for Business** - Learning management
- **Coursera** - Enterprise learning platform

## General HR Platforms
- **Workday** - Limited native Slack (via API)
- **SuccessFactors** - Enterprise HR suite
- **Namely** - Mid-market HRIS

## Popular Slack HR Apps (Native)
- **Donut** - Team building and recognition
- **HeyTaco** - Recognition and rewards
- **Bonusly** - Performance recognition
- **TinyPulse** - Engagement surveys

**Tip:** Most modern HR tools offer Slack integration either natively or through Zapier/webhooks. Check integrations before choosing.
